name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for work illness in West Valley City?
description: Utah: 3 years from knowing it's work-related; don't wait.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for work illness in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: 3 years from knowing it's work-related; don't wait.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, file within 3 years of injury knowledge or 12 years of accident for occupational diseases.[1] Deadlines run from when you knew or should have known the illness was work-related.[3] Key factors: (1) discovery date of causation; (2) state-specific limits (Idaho: 1 year from disablement); (3) continuous exposure tolling. Track symptoms and consult lawyer to calculate precisely. Missing deadlines bars claims permanently. Act fast post-diagnosis.
